name: Italian-Style Walleye
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the walleye in a greased shallow baking dish.
2. Combine the tomato sauce, parsley, Italian seasoning, basil, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Pour the sauce mixture over the fish.
4. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
5. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese evenly over the top of the fish.
6. Continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
Yield: 4-6 servings
